camera.scanSubtitle: Point the camera at the vehicle QR sticker
camera.scanning: Scanning… align the QR code inside the frame
camera.insecureContext: Your browser blocks the camera on insecure pages. Open the app via HTTPS.
camera.insecureHint: Ask your admin to use the https://… URL or run on localhost during development.
camera.unsupportedBrowser: This browser does not expose a camera API.
camera.permissionDenied: Camera permission was denied for this site.
camera.permissionHint: Open your browser site settings, allow camera access for this domain, and reload.
camera.noCamera: No camera was found on this device.
camera.noCameraHint: Connect a webcam, or use another device with a camera.
camera.inUse: The camera is being used by another application.
camera.inUseHint: Close other apps or browser tabs that may be using the camera and try again.

visits.title: Visits
visits.scanQrCheckInHint: Scan a vehicle QR to start a visit
visits.vehicleNotFoundShort: Vehicle not found. Check the code or register it under Vehicles.
visits.vehiclesGlobalRegistryHint: Register at this workshop to check in
visits.noVehicleMatches: No vehicle matches in this workshop or the global registry.
visits.reportHint: Professional PDF for the customer and your records.
visits.mechanicWorkHint: Use the Work tab to add services and labor (your time is tracked per line). Use the Inspection tab to complete or update the 360° check. Other mechanics can work on the same vehicle visit.
visits.openVisitHint: Add work items and finish when ready. The 360° inspection is optional.
visits.confirmFinishBody: This will complete the visit, update vehicle mileage/hours, and lock the record.
visits.noInspection: No inspection recorded for this visit.
visits.selectVehicleHint: Select the vehicle for this visit.
visits.alreadyCompletedNav: This visit is already completed. Opening the visit summary.
visits.checklistOptional: Optional — open checklist to add one
visits.visitNotReady: Visit is not ready yet. Finish creating the visit, then add parts.
visits.noInventoryHint: Add parts under Inventory, then return here to use them on this visit.
visits.outOfStockToast: {{name}} is out of stock. Add inventory or choose another part.
visits.savePartsFirst: Save the visit first, then add parts.
visits.pmPanelHint: Select each PM to add a zero-price closure line, then add billable work (oil, filters, diagnosis, etc.) under Work.
visits.pmClosureMissingCatalog: No PM closure item in your catalog for this type. Add one under Services.
visits.pmClosureAddFailed: Failed to add PM closure line

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and preferences
settings.workshopAdminOnly: Only workshop admins can edit these fields.
settings.languageHelp: Workshop language for the screen and PDF reports.
settings.emailNotificationsHint: Maintenance reminders and updates via email
settings.smsNotificationsHint: Maintenance reminders and updates via SMS
settings.whatsappNotificationsHint: Maintenance reminders and updates via WhatsApp
settings.quickPinSet: A PIN is set for quick sign-in at the login screen.
settings.quickPinUnset: Set a 4–6 digit PIN for quick sign-in (login → Quick PIN tab).
settings.pinCurrentPasswordHint: Enter your current password above when saving a PIN.
settings.inviteMechanicHint: Generate a one-time link (valid 24 hours). Copy it or send via email or WhatsApp.
settings.inviteModalHint: Generate a link, copy it, and send it to your mechanic however you prefer.
settings.inviteShareHint: Copy the link below and share it with your mechanic (SMS, email, WhatsApp, etc.).
settings.inviteDailyLimit: Daily limit reached (3 invites per day). Try again tomorrow.
settings.inviteMonthlyLimit: Monthly limit reached (10 invites per month).

errors.passwordFieldsRequired: Please fill in all password fields.
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.pinFieldsRequired: Please fill in current password and both PIN fields.
errors.pinMinLength: PIN must be at least 4 digits.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Invite mechanics and service advisors to your workshop (max 5 accounts).
team.settingsHint: Add staff, assign roles, and deactivate accounts when someone leaves.
team.passwordRequired: Password is required for new users.
team.deleteMessage: Remove {{name}} from the workshop? Their login will stop working.
team.empty: No team members yet. Add your first mechanic or service advisor.
team.inviteHint: Generate a one-time link (valid 24 hours). Copy it or send via email or WhatsApp.

staffInvite.title: Join your workshop
staffInvite.subtitle: Create your account using the invite from your workshop admin.
staffInvite.expiresHint: This link expires within 24 hours and works only once.

staffInvite.expired: This invite link has expired. Ask your workshop admin for a new one.

loginAudit.title: Login activity
loginAudit.subtitle: Successful and failed sign-in attempts for the last 30 days.
loginAudit.workshopHint: Review sign-in activity for your workshop staff.
loginAudit.empty: No login events in this period.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your workshop dashboard
auth.pinHint: Workshop quick sign-in PIN. Set it under Settings → Security.
auth.heroBody: The all-in-one platform for automotive and machinery workshops. Manage visits, inventory, and inspections with ease.

inventory.name: Name
inventory.newSubtitle: Add a new part or material

platformBilling.title: Platform billing
platformBilling.subtitle: What the PLATFORM charges this workshop. Distinct from this workshop's prices for its own service-catalog. Each new transfer or registration freezes a snapshot of these values, so changes here never rewrite historical fees.
platformBilling.registrationFeeHint: Charged once when a vehicle is added to the global registry.
platformBilling.superadminNotesPlaceholder: Visible only to superadmins (pilot pricing, manual adjustments, …)

photoGallery.title: Photo gallery
photoGallery.ownerSubtitle: Uploaded by the workshops that have serviced this vehicle.

landing.heroBody: Manage vehicles, visits, and service history — for workshops and owners.

workflow.title: One vehicle record, two connected experiences
workflow.subtitle: Workshops manage client vehicles day to day. Owners stay linked through the same profile — with full visibility into service history.
workflow.hubBody: Every visit, inspection, and update is stored on one record — accessible to the workshop and the owner.
workflow.workshop1Body: Add your customers and their cars, trucks, or machinery to your workshop.
workflow.workshop2Body: Start visits with QR check-in, run inspections, and log work from phone or tablet.
workflow.workshop3Body: Build a complete service history — parts, labour, mileage, and photos for each client vehicle.
workflow.owner1Body: After a service, scan the QR code on your vehicle record to connect with Workshop360.
workflow.owner2Body: Create a free owner account and link the vehicle to your personal garage.
workflow.owner3Body: See visits, inspections, and updates from your workshop — anytime, on any device.

services.title: Service catalog
services.description: Manage standard services your workshop offers
services.noResults: No services found matching your search
services.deleteMessage: This will remove the service from the catalog. Existing visits using this service will not be affected.
services.newDescription: Add a new service to the catalog
services.pmKindHint: When set, your workshop will see matching PM work orders for vehicles you service.

pmOrders.title: Preventive maintenance
pmOrders.subtitle: Open service reminders for vehicles in your registry. Contact the owner to schedule work.
pmOrders.empty: No open preventive maintenance work orders for your workshop.
pmOrders.offeredKinds: Your workshop receives PM orders for: {{kinds}}
pmOrders.contactOwnerHint: Contact the vehicle owner to confirm timing before booking a visit.
pmOrders.autoCompleteHint: PM orders close when you finish the visit with a zero-price PM closure line from your catalog, plus any billable work you performed.
pmOrders.catalogFilterHint: Only shops with matching services in their catalog see these orders.
pmOrders.ownerSectionHint: Workshops that service this vehicle may contact you to schedule.

vehicleMaintenance.title: Planned services
vehicleMaintenance.subtitle: Configure when regular service, major service, and tire changes are due for this vehicle.
vehicleMaintenance.deleteMessage: This vehicle will no longer follow this schedule.
vehicleMaintenance.seasonHint: Winter tires are required from the start date through the end date each year. Reminders are sent before winter and before summer periods.

vehicles.archivedViewHint: This vehicle is archived. You can still view history, inspections, and download reports. Restore it to show in the active vehicle list.
vehicles.archiveMessage: This vehicle will be hidden from default lists. Service history is kept.
vehicles.restoreMessage: This vehicle will appear in active lists again.
vehicles.deleteMessage: Only use this if the vehicle was added by mistake and has no visits. This cannot be undone.
vehicles.deleteBlocked: Cannot delete: this vehicle has service visits. Archive it instead.
vehicles.historyReportHint: PDF with all completed visits, inspections, and totals for the selected period.
vehicles.historyNoVisits: No completed visits in this period.
vehicles.descriptionPlaceholder: Notes about condition, modifications, known issues, etc.
vehicles.mileageHoursHint: Use mileage for road vehicles, hour meter for equipment — one or both, or leave blank if unknown.

vehicles.subtitle: Manage workshop vehicles
vehicles.qnapHint: Importing files from a connected QNAP folder.

ownerQr.title: Owner & registration

ownerQr.qrOwnerLineTwo: Owner scans to add this vehicle to their app
ownerQr.qrTransferLineScan: New owner scans after document verification
ownerQr.toastTransferInitiated: Transfer initiated — share the QR with the new owner
ownerQr.errVehicleNotInRegistry: Vehicle is not yet registered in the global registry.

marketplaceList.beTheFirst: Be the first to list a part for sale!
marketplaceList.deleteBody: This will remove the listing from the marketplace.

marketplaceCatalog.subtitle: Browse spare parts from workshops across the platform
marketplaceCatalog.noPartsHint: Try different filters or check back later.

marketplaceSeller.title: My marketplace listings
marketplaceSeller.registerHint: Create your workshop seller profile to list spare parts for other workshops.
marketplaceSeller.addPartHint: Parts appear to other workshops once your seller profile is approved.
marketplaceSeller.approved: Your seller profile is approved — parts are visible in search.
marketplaceSeller.pendingHint: You can add parts now; they stay hidden from other workshops until a superadmin approves your seller profile.
marketplaceSeller.noParts: You have not listed any parts yet.
marketplaceSeller.typeIdentifiedHint: OEM or supplier part number — searchable by cross-reference numbers.
marketplaceSeller.typeGenericHint: No part numbers — describe what you have (typical for used take-offs).
marketplaceSeller.identifiersHint: Provide at least an OEM number or a supplier part number. Cross-references help other workshops find your listing.
marketplaceSeller.identifierRequired: OEM number or part number is required for catalog-identified listings.
marketplaceSeller.crossReferencesHint: Alternate OEM or aftermarket numbers that match this part.
marketplaceSeller.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Front brake pads — VW Golf MK5 1.9 TDI
marketplaceSeller.locationPlaceholder: Leave blank to use seller profile city
marketplaceSeller.activeListing: Listing is active (visible when seller is approved)
marketplaceSeller.editPartHint: Update part details, identifiers, or reactivate a deactivated listing.
marketplaceSeller.deleteBody: This deactivates the part listing. You can add it again later.

marketplaceBanner.title: Suggested spare parts
marketplaceBanner.subtitle: Parts from other workshops that may fit this vehicle
marketplaceBanner.pickIssue: Choose an issue to see matching parts from the marketplace.
marketplaceBanner.empty: No matching parts found for this issue.
marketplaceBanner.categoryFallback: Showing category matches — full vehicle compatibility not verified for these listings yet.

adminTransfers.subtitle: Cross-tenant transfer ledger. Mark disputed, reverse, or update billing.

adminTransfers.noResults: No transfers match the current filters.
adminTransfers.disputedHint: Freezes the vehicle's ownership changes until reviewed. Notes are visible only to platform superadmins.
adminTransfers.reverseHint: Appends a new ownership row restoring the previous owner. Never deletes history.
